title: Packs / Xananode Canonical / Assets / Raw / Protocol / Examples / Custom Extension Substrate / Substrate
summary: packs/xananode-canonical/assets/raw/protocol/examples/custom-extension-substrate/substrate.json is preserved as a raw Core SDK source artifact in the XanaNode Core SDK substrate.
content:
{
  "id": "example.museum",
  "name": "Museum Extension Substrate",
  "description": "Example of a XanaNode-compatible substrate with local schema extensions.",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "namespace": "example.museum",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/kingc95/xananode.git",
    "default_branch": "main",
    "path": "examples/custom-extension-substrate"
  },
  "schema_version": "xananode-core@0.5.0",
  "license": "CC-BY-4.0",
  "imports": [
    "xananode:core"
  ],
  "extensions": [
    "schemas/node-types.example.museum.json",
    "schemas/relationship-types.example.museum.json"
  ]
}
